assertions.expectation: Checks for deprecated API usage that may have changed behavior in 1.30
assertions.reason: The response includes commands to check for deprecated API usage: 'kubectl get events --all-namespaces | grep -i deprecat' and 'kubectl api-versions'

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking admission webhooks — they may be rejecting or slowing down requests on the new version
assertions.reason: The response specifically mentions checking admission controller changes and logs with 'kubectl logs -n kube-system -l component=kube-apiserver | grep admission' and mentions reviewing admission webhooks in the 'If Issues Persist' section

assertions.expectation: Advises checking if resource requests/limits need adjusting for any system components that changed
assertions.reason: The response includes checking for resource constraints with 'kubectl describe pod -n kube-system -l component=kube-apiserver' and 'kubectl top nodes' to look for CPU/memory throttling

assertions.expectation: Suggests examining kube-system pods for any that are crashlooping or restarting
assertions.reason: The response explicitly includes commands to check kube-system pods: 'kubectl get pods -n kube-system' and 'kubectl get events -n kube-system --sort-by='.lastTimestamp'' with specific mention of looking for crashlooping or pending pods

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check API server metrics and latency (kubectl get --raw /metrics)
assertions.reason: The response includes specific monitoring commands: 'kubectl get --raw /metrics | grep apiserver_request_duration' and 'kubectl get --raw /metrics | grep apiserver_flowcontrol'

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking if NetworkPolicy or service mesh components need updating for the new version
assertions.reason: The response includes checking network policies with 'kubectl get networkpolicies --all-namespaces' and mentions that '1.32 may have stricter defaults'

assertions.expectation: Advises reviewing pod events for scheduling delays or readiness probe failures
assertions.reason: The response includes commands to check events: 'kubectl get events -n kube-system --sort-by='.lastTimestamp'' and 'kubectl get events --all-namespaces | grep -i deprecat'

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking if HPA or VPA are behaving differently on the new version
assertions.reason: The response does not mention HPA (Horizontal Pod Autoscaler) or VPA (Vertical Pod Autoscaler) at all
